candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository contains a Nix Flake[^1] for Typst. It exports a Nix package that can build Typst's CLI using the Nix tool. It is compatible at least with the latest Typst release, and should also build the latest commits on Typst's `main` branch. Should any problems or incompat…
